name: cultural_socialization_in_childhood
description: Measures the degree to which respondents were exposed to cultural practices and resources during childhood through parental behavior, capturing early cultural capital transmission within the family.

name: reading_engagement_and_literacy
description: Measures respondents' current relationship with reading, including access to books, perceived reading ability, self-reported reading habits across publication types, and perceived barriers to reading.

name: cultural_identity_and_heritage
description: Measures respondents' sense of cultural belonging and self-identification, including ethnic/racial self-categorization, indigenous or distinct heritage recognition, first language, and identification as part of a discriminated group.

name: attitudes_toward_cultural_openness_and_foreign_influence
description: Measures respondents' orientations toward cultural diversity and external cultural influence, including perceptions of foreign cultural impact, preferences for cultural homogeneity versus pluralism, and openness to multicultural education.

name: sports_engagement_and_media_consumption
description: Measures respondents' involvement with sports both as active participants and as media audiences, as well as their beliefs about the social function of sport and what motivates youth participation.
